diagrams.title: Data Center Energy Distribution Pie Chart
diagrams.description: Shows typical breakdown of energy consumption in a data center
diagrams.purpose: Understand where energy goes and identify optimization opportunities

diagrams.title: Hot/Cold Aisle Containment Layout
diagrams.description: Server row arrangement showing hot and cold air flow separation
elements: Server rows facing each other (cold aisle)
Server rows with backs facing (hot aisle)
Cold air supply from CRAC units
Hot air return to cooling units

diagrams.title: PUE Formula Diagram
diagrams.description: Visual representation of PUE calculation components
diagrams.purpose: Understand PUE metric and what values mean

diagrams.title: Virtualization Concept Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows one physical server running multiple virtual machines
diagrams.purpose: Understand how virtualization reduces physical hardware needs
